pr.title: [Non-record] 1-Stage Byte-level H-Net at 17.5M: Dynamic Chunking Learns Word Boundaries (39x-91x fewer params than H-Net paper)

output.summary: Byte-level 1-stage H-Net pairs tuned ratio loss and deeper outer layers to learn whitespace-aligned boundaries via dynamic chunking on raw bytes.
techniques: - Dynamic chunking via cosine-based router compresses sequences before the main transformer stage
- Tuned ratio loss weight and outer depth guide whitespace-aware, wordlike segmentation
- Multi-GPU DDP training with padded chunk sequences enables artifact-sized runs
